channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: US Sen. Lindsey Graham has died after a brief and unexpected illness, his office says
item.description: U.S. Sen. Lindsey Graham, a close ally of President Donald Trump, has died at 71 after a brief illness, according to his office.

item.title: Takeaways from a weeklong preliminary hearing in the Charlie Kirk murder case
Dangerous heat wave threatens oppressive temperatures in much of the US
